testimonials.title: Loved by Businesses Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of businesses trust Yetti to handle their customer conversations 24/7. See what they're saying.
testimonials.testimonial1.text: Yetti has completely transformed how we handle customer service. We went from missing 40% of DMs to responding to every customer in seconds. Sales have increased 35% since we deployed Yetti on Instagram and Messenger. The best part? It took us less than 30 minutes to set up.
testimonials.testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.testimonial2.text: We were losing sales because we couldn't respond to customer questions fast enough. Yetti handles everything automatically now. Cart recovery alone has paid for the subscription ten times over.
testimonials.testimonial2.name: Marcus Rodriguez
testimonials.testimonial3.text: Setup was incredibly easy. I uploaded our product catalog, set up a few workflows in Sheets, and Yetti was handling customer conversations the same day. Game changer.
testimonials.testimonial3.name: Emma Thompson
testimonials.testimonial4.text: Yetti understands our brand voice perfectly. Customers can't tell they're talking to an AI. Response quality is consistently excellent.
testimonials.testimonial4.name: David Kim

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Yetti. Can't find your answer? Reach out to our team.
faq.q1.question: What exactly does Yetti.ai do?
faq.q1.answer: Yetti.ai is your 24/7 AI sales agent that responds instantly to DMs on social media. It answers questions, explains your products, captures leads, books appointments, and helps convert conversations into sales automatically, even while you sleep.
faq.q2.question: How does Yetti learn about my business?
faq.q2.answer: Training your Yetti takes just minutes. Upload PDFs, Google Sheets, or simple text, and your agent instantly learns your product details, pricing, FAQs, policies, and brand voice. You can update or add information whenever you need.
faq.q3.question: How accurate are Yetti's responses?
faq.q3.answer: Very accurate, your agent only uses the information you provide. This keeps responses consistent, on-brand, and aligned with your business. You can also customize tone, rules, and behavior to match your exact style.
faq.q4.question: What happens if Yetti doesn't know the answer?
faq.q4.answer: If something isn't covered in your training data, Yetti can give a helpful fallback message, ask for more details, don't worry. It won't make anything up about your business.
faq.q5.question: How do Yetti Tokens work?
faq.q5.answer: Tokens are your monthly usage credits. Each AI reply uses a token, and your plan determines how many replies you can send per month. Plans start at 1,000 tokens and scale up as your business grows.
faq.q6.question: Do I need coding skills to use Yetti?
faq.q6.answer: No coding required! Everything is done through our web interface and Google Sheets. You can train Yetti, build workflows, and manage conversations all without writing a single line of code.
faq.q7.question: Can I integrate Yetti with my existing tools?
faq.q7.answer: Yes, Yetti integrates with popular ecommerce platforms, CRMs, inventory systems, and custom APIs. It becomes the central hub for all your customer interactions.
faq.q8.question: How does Yetti handle conversations outside business hours?
faq.q8.answer: Yetti is designed to gracefully handle unknowns. It can either route the conversation to your human team, collect customer information for follow-up, or provide helpful context based on what it does know. You control the fallback behavior and can set custom business hours in your workspace settings.

solutions.solution2.title: Stop Repeating Yourself

solutions.solution2.solution: Train your Yetti once with PDFs, Google Sheets, or text—it handles repetitive conversations forever.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: Introduction
privacy.section1.content1: yetti AI ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI integration platform and services.
privacy.section1.content2: By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
privacy.section2.title: Information We Collect
privacy.section2.subsection1.title: 2.1 Personal Information
privacy.section2.subsection1.intro: We may collect the following types of personal information:
privacy.section2.subsection1.item1: Name and contact information (email address, phone number)
privacy.section2.subsection2.title: 2.2 Usage Information
privacy.section2.subsection2.intro: We automatically collect certain information about your use of our services:
privacy.section2.subsection2.item1: Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
privacy.section2.subsection3.title: 2.3 AI Agent Data
privacy.section2.subsection3.intro: When you use our AI integration services, we may process:
privacy.section2.subsection3.item1: Messages and conversations processed by your AI agents
privacy.section2.subsection3.item4: Knowledge base content and training data
privacy.section3.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.section3.intro: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.section3.item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.section3.item2: Process and fulfill your requests and transactions
privacy.section3.item3: Communicate with you about our services and updates
privacy.section3.item4: Provide customer support and technical assistance
privacy.section3.item5: Analyze usage patterns and optimize service performance
privacy.section4.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
privacy.section4.intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy.section4.item2: To comply with legal obligations or court orders
privacy.section4.item3: To protect our rights, property, or safety
privacy.section4.item4: With trusted service providers who assist in our operations
privacy.section4.item5: In connection with a business transfer or acquisition
privacy.section5.title: Data Security
privacy.section5.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:
privacy.section5.item1: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
privacy.section5.item4: Employee training on data protection practices
privacy.section5.item5: Incident response and breach notification procedures
privacy.section6.title: Your Rights and Choices
privacy.section6.intro: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
privacy.section6.item1: Access and obtain a copy of your personal information
privacy.section6.item4: Restrict or object to certain processing activities
privacy.section6.contactNote: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in the "Contact Us" section.
privacy.section7.title: Data Retention
privacy.section7.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. When we no longer need your information, we will securely delete or anonymize it.
privacy.section8.title: International Data Transfers
privacy.section8.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws and implement appropriate safeguards to protect your information.
privacy.section9.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.section9.content: Our services are not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy.section10.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.section10.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy.section11.title: Contact Us
privacy.section11.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.section1.content: By accessing and using yetti AI's services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.section2.title: 2. Description of Service
terms.section2.content1: yetti AI provides an AI integration platform that allows users to connect their AI agents to various social media and messaging platforms including but not limited to Instagram, Telegram, WhatsApp, and other third-party services.
terms.section2.content2: Our service includes tools for creating, managing, and deploying AI agents, as well as analytics and monitoring capabilities.
terms.section3.title: 3. User Accounts
terms.section3.subsection1.title: 3.1 Account Creation
terms.section3.subsection1.content: To use our services, you must create an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.
terms.section3.subsection2.title: 3.2 Account Security
terms.section3.subsection2.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.section4.title: 4. Acceptable Use
terms.section4.subsection1.title: 4.1 Permitted Uses
terms.section4.subsection1.intro: You may use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use our services:
terms.section4.subsection1.item1: In any way that violates any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation
terms.section4.subsection1.item2: To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material without our prior written consent
terms.section4.subsection1.item3: To impersonate or attempt to impersonate the Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity
terms.section4.subsection1.item4: To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the service
terms.section4.subsection2.title: 4.2 Prohibited Activities
terms.section4.subsection2.item1: Use our services to create, distribute, or facilitate spam, malware, or other harmful content
terms.section4.subsection2.item2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of our services or any other systems or networks
terms.section4.subsection2.item3: Use automated means to access our services for any purpose without our express written permission
terms.section4.subsection2.item4: Interfere with or disrupt our services or servers or networks connected to our services
terms.section4.subsection2.item5: Use our services to violate the terms of service of any third-party platform
terms.section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
terms.section5.subsection1.title: 5.1 Our Rights
terms.section5.subsection1.content: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of yetti AI and its licensors. The service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws.
terms.section5.subsection2.title: 5.2 Your Content
terms.section5.subsection2.content: You retain ownership of any content you create, upload, or share through our services. By using our services, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, modify, and distribute your content solely for the purpose of providing our services.
terms.section6.title: 6. Payment Terms
terms.section6.subsection1.title: Subscription Fees
terms.section6.subsection1.content: Some features are provided for a fee. You agree to pay all applicable fees as described at the time of purchase.
terms.section6.subsection2.title: Billing & Renewal
terms.section6.subsection2.content: Fees are billed in advance. Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled before the billing period ends.
terms.section6.subsection3.title: Refunds
terms.section6.subsection3.content: Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. Contact our support team to discuss refund requests.
terms.section7.title: 7. Privacy and Data Protection
terms.section7.content: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs your use of the service, to understand our practices.
terms.section8.title: 8. Service Availability
terms.section8.content: We strive to maintain high service availability, but we do not guarantee that our services will be uninterrupted or error-free. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services at any time.
terms.section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.section9.content: In no event shall yetti AI, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your use of the service.
terms.section10.title: 10. Indemnification
terms.section10.content: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless yetti AI and its licensee and licensors, and their employees, contractors, agents, officers and directors, from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs or debt, and expenses (including but not limited to attorney's fees).
terms.section11.title: 11. Termination
terms.section11.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to the service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of the Terms.
terms.section12.title: 12. Governing Law
terms.section12.content: These Terms shall be interpreted and governed by the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.
terms.section13.title: 13. Changes to Terms
terms.section13.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect.
terms.section14.title: 14. Contact Information
terms.section14.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
